name: Barri Booth
description_short: Barri is a money services company offering check cashing, money transfers, bill payments, mobile reloads, and a prepaid Visa debit card with 30+ years of experience.
description_long:
Barri Group is an established money services provider with over 30 years of experience in the remittance and financial services space. The company operates a network of physical locations alongside a mobile app, positioning itself as a comprehensive financial platform for underbanked consumers, particularly those sending money internationally or managing household finances without traditional banking.

Barri's core services include check cashing with extended hours and transparent pricing, domestic and international money transfers, utility and service bill payments, mobile phone reloads across the US and Latin America, and a branded Visa debit card for account management. The company has also partnered with Oportun to offer personal loans ranging from $300 to $10,000, expanding beyond traditional money services into credit-building territory.

Barri differentiates itself through a bilingual, Latino-focused customer experience, a highly-rated mobile app (4.9 stars), and integration of multiple services into a single platform accessible both online and in physical stores. The company emphasizes convenience, accessibility, and customer service responsiveness.

As a check-cashing and money services company rather than a bank or credit union, Barri does not offer FDIC-insured deposit accounts. Consumers should verify current fee structures for each service, as check-cashing and wire transfer fees vary by transaction type. The partnership with Oportun for personal loans suggests credit products may carry significant interest rates typical of non-bank lenders.
address: 9308 N Lamar Blvd ste b, Austin, TX 78753

company_info.headquarters: 9308 N Lamar Blvd ste b, Austin, TX 78753

pros: Extended check-cashing hours with convenient store locations and transparent, competitive pricing
Integrated mobile app rated 4.9 stars enabling money transfers, bill payments, and account management from anywhere
International money transfer capability to Mexico, Central America, and South America with established reliability
Personal loans from $300–$10,000 available through Oportun partnership for credit-building or emergency expenses
Prepaid Visa debit card (Barri Card) for secure money management, bill payment, and remittance handling
Instant mobile reloads across US and Latin America destinations
30+ years of operational history and customer trust reflected in verified app reviews and community testimonials
cons: No FDIC-insured deposit or savings accounts—services are transactional rather than deposit-based
Personal loans through Oportun partnership likely carry high interest rates typical of non-bank lenders; rates and terms not disclosed on website
Fee structures for check cashing, wire transfers, and international remittances not transparently published on homepage
Physical store network limits accessibility for customers in areas without nearby Barri locations
As a money services company rather than a regulated bank, fewer consumer protections than traditional banking
best_for: Latino and immigrant households sending regular remittances to family in Latin America
Unbanked and underbanked consumers needing check cashing, bill payment, and money transfer services
Customers seeking to build credit history through small personal loans while managing household finances
International callers needing quick, reliable money transfer with extended-hours physical locations
diagnosis: Barri is best for Latino and immigrant communities seeking convenient, accessible money transfer and check-cashing services with an extended-hours store network and integrated mobile platform. The main caveat is that Barri is not a bank and does not offer FDIC-insured deposits; it functions as a money services provider focused on transactions rather than wealth-building products, and personal loans through its Oportun partnership likely carry high interest rates.
services: Check cashing with extended hours and transparent pricing
Domestic and international money transfers (online, app, or in-store)
Bill payment and utility payment processing
Mobile phone reloads (US and Latin America)
Barri branded Visa prepaid debit card
Mobile app with account management and transaction history
